# returnIndicesDataType

**Instance Property**

Defines the data type for returned indices. Use this in conjunction with [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/maxPooling2DReturnIndices(_:descriptor:name:)] API. Currently MPSGraph supports the following datatypes: `MPSDataTypeInt32`. Default value: `MPSDataTypeInt32`.

## Declaration

```swift
var returnIndicesDataType: MPSDataType { get set }
```
title: returnIndicesDataType
